title: Iran’s Fractured Leadership Is Struggling to Coordinate, Officials Say
summary_full: As leaders are killed and replaced, Iranian negotiators may not know what their government is willing to concede in any negotiations.
summary_public: As leaders are killed and replaced, Iranian negotiators may not know what their government is willing to concede in any negotiations.
